CASE SETTLED BY WRITTEN STIPULATION, TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT AS FOLLOWS:-DEFT TO VACATE THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2395-26TH AVE.,#2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. ON 6/8/04 BEFORE 5PM. IF DEFT. COMPLIES PLTF. TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON 6/10/04. LEASE IS FORFEITED. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. PROVIDED DEFTS. FILE NO CLAIMS AGAINST PLTF.; PLTF. SHALL NOT PURSUE DEFT. FOR ANY UNPAID RENT. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE THE PREMISES AS AGREED, PLTF. TO NOTIFY DEFT WITH 24HR TELEPHONE NOTICE, PLTF TO OBTAIN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, BACK RENT OF $2800., SECURITY DEPOSIT IF ANY IS FORFEITED.
